chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 129 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.593/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For orders on CMA No.594/2023 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case 26.01.2023 Mr. Muhammad Aslam Gadani, Advocate for the petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2 to 4. Through instant petition, the petitioner, inter alia, seeks following relief(s): a) To restrain respondent No.2 for not entertaining same nature petitions of respondent No.3 filed before this Honourable Court. b) To direct the respondent No.2 for taking legal action against the respondent No.3 for filing same nature petitions before this Honourable Court. At the very outset, learned Counsel is put on notice to satisfy the Court as to the maintainability of this petition. To that, he states that the instant petition has been filed for the prevention of same nature petitions filed by the respondent No.3 against the petitioner, as the said respondent is continuously misleading this Court and filing petitions of the same nature only to get contradictory orders. We are afraid, the petitioner through instant petition is seeking restraining order against this Court from exercising its Constitutional jurisdictions provided under Article 199 of the Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973 which, even otherwise, cannot be curtailed. Hence, this petition is dismissed in limine along with listed application with cost of Rs.10,000/- (Rupees ten thousand), to be deposited by the petitioner with the High Court Clinic fund.

Hence, this petition is dismissed in limine along with listed application with cost of Rs.10,000/- (Rupees ten thousand), to be deposited by the petitioner with the High Court Clinic fund. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
